question_en: My child is shy. Can they survive in these high-tech global careers?
question_hi_hinglish: Mera baccha sharmila hai. Kya wo in global careers mein tik payega?
answer_en: Being shy is not a barrier, but communication is a skill that can be learned. In 2026, we focus on 'Supercommunication'—learning to listen deeply and speak clearly. Many successful tech experts are introverts who communicate brilliantly via writing and video calls. Shyness disappears when a child gains confidence in their knowledge.
answer_hi_hinglish: Sharmila hona koi buri baat nahi hai, par sahi tarike se baat karna ek hunar hai jo seekha ja sakta hai. 2026 mein hum 'Supercommunication' par zor dete hain—yani dhyan se sunna aur saaf bolna. Bahut se bade tech experts kam bolte hain par sahi bolte hain. Jab bacche ko apne kaam ki jaankari hoti hai, toh uska darr apne aap khatam ho jata hai.

question_en: If there is no 'Boss' watching them at home, will my child waste time?
question_hi_hinglish: Agar ghar par koi 'Boss' dekhne wala nahi hoga, toh kya mera baccha waqt barbaad karega?
answer_en: Working from home in 2026 requires 'Self-Discipline.' We teach students to use digital tools like 'Time-Blockers' and 'Task Managers.' They learn that their pay is based on the 'Result,' not the hours spent sitting. This builds a sense of responsibility where the child becomes their own boss, which is the greatest life skill of all.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ghar se kaam karne ke liye 'Self-Discipline' chahiye hota hai. Hum baccho ko 'Time-Blockers' jaise apps use karna sikhate hain. Unhe samajh aata hai ki paise 'kaam khatam karne' ke milte hain, sirf 'baithne' ke nahi. Isse bacche mein zimmedari aati hai aur wo khud apna boss banna seekh jata hai.

question_en: What if a client or boss is unhappy or gets angry? How should my child react?
question_hi_hinglish: Agar koi client ya boss gussa ho jaye ya kaam pasand na kare, toh bacche ko kya karna chahiye?
answer_en: We teach 'Emotional Intelligence.' Instead of getting scared or angry, the child learns to say: 'I understand your point, let’s find a solution.' In 2026, companies value people who can stay calm under pressure. Dealing with a difficult person is a superpower that helps in both office and personal life.
answer_hi_hinglish: Hum baccho ko 'Emotional Intelligence' sikhate hain. Gussa hone ya darne ke bajaye, baccha ye kehna seekhta hai: 'Main apki baat samajh raha hoon, chaliye ise milkar thik karte hain.' 2026 mein shant rehne walo ki bahut izzat hai. Mushkil logo se nipatna ek aisi kala hai jo career aur ghar, dono mein kaam aati hai.

question_en: What is 'Networking'? Is it just about making friends online?
question_hi_hinglish: Ye 'Networking' kya hai? Kya ye sirf online dost banana hai?
answer_en: Networking is building 'Professional Friendships.' In 2026, who you know is as important as what you know. We teach students how to connect with experts on LinkedIn and share their work. It’s not about 'asking for a job,' but about 'sharing value.' A good network act as a safety net that always brings new opportunities.
answer_hi_hinglish: Networking ka matlab hai 'kaam ke silsile mein rishte banana.' 2026 mein aap kise jaante hain, ye bahut maine rakhta hai. Hum baccho ko LinkedIn par experts se judna sikhate hain. Ye 'naukri mangna' nahi hai, balki 'apna hunar dikhana' hai. Ek accha network bacche ke liye naye maukon ke darwaze hamesha khula rakhta hai.

question_en: Will my child have to study for their whole life in these new careers?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya in naye careers mein mere bacche ko poori zindagi padhna padega?
answer_en: In 2026, we don't 'study' to pass exams; we 'learn' to stay relevant. Technology changes every year. We teach the 'Learning to Learn' habit. If they spend just 30 minutes a day learning something new, they will never be unemployed. It’s like sharpening a knife so that the work becomes easier and faster.
answer_hi_hinglish: 2026 mein hum exam pass karne ke liye nahi, balki update rehne ke liye padhte hain. Technology har saal badalti hai. Hum baccho mein 'roz kuch naya seekhne' ki aadat dalte hain. Agar wo roz sirf 30 minute bhi kuch naya seekhein, toh wo kabhi be-rozgaar nahi honge. Ye bilkul chaku ki dhaar tez karne jaisa hai.

question_en: How does my child ask for a higher salary or a better price for their work?
question_hi_hinglish: Mera baccha zyada salary ya apne kaam ke sahi daam kaise maange?
answer_en: This is 'Negotiation.' We teach them to show 'Value' instead of 'Need.' Instead of saying 'I need more money,' they learn to say 'My work helped the company save time/money, so my fee should reflect that.' Talking about money with confidence is a vital life skill that ensures they are never underpaid.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ise 'Negotiation' kehte hain. Hum baccho ko 'Zaroorat' ke bajaye 'Kamyabi' dikhana sikhate hain. 'Mujhe paiso ki zaroorat hai' kehne ke bajaye, wo ye kehna seekhte hain ki 'Mere kaam se company ka fayda hua hai, isliye meri fees badhni chahiye.' Paise ki baat confidence se karna ek bahut zaroori hunar hai.

question_en: What if my child applies for 10 jobs and gets 10 rejections?
question_hi_hinglish: Agar mera baccha 10 jagah apply kare aur har jagah se 'No' sunne ko mile toh?
answer_en: Rejection is just 'Feedback.' In 2026, the market is competitive. We build 'Resilience'—the ability to bounce back. We teach them to ask: 'Why was I rejected? What can I improve?' One 'Yes' is all they need, and the 10 'No's' are just steps leading to that success. Mental strength is the foundation of the Pehchaan program.
answer_hi_hinglish: Rejection ka matlab haar nahi, balki 'seekh' hai. 2026 mein competition zyada hai, isliye hum baccho ko 'Resilience' (dobara uthne ki taqat) sikhate hain. Ek 'Haan' sunne ke liye 10 baar 'No' sunna pad sakta hai. Hum unhe sikhate hain ki har 'No' se seekh kar aage kaise badhna hai. Mann ki shakti hi sabse badi jeet hai.

question_en: Does my child need to wear a suit-tie to work from home on video calls?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya ghar se kaam karte waqt video call par suit-tie pehenna zaroori hai?
answer_en: In 2026, 'Professionalism' means being clean, organized, and punctual. They don't always need a suit, but a neat shirt, a clean background, and a polite smile are mandatory. Good manners on a video call show respect for the other person’s time. Dressing well also helps the child feel more focused and ready for work.
answer_hi_hinglish: 2026 mein professionalism ka matlab hai—saaf-suthra rehna aur waqt ka pakka hona. Suit-tie hamesha zaroori nahi, par ek saaf shirt aur dhang ka background zaroori hai. Video call par tameez se baat karna samne wale ki izzat dikhata hai. Acche kapde pehenne se bacche ka apna mann bhi kaam mein zyada lagta hai.
